title: Ranunculus pilosifrons
taxonomy: Ranunculus pilosifrons is classified within the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the buttercup family. This plant belongs to the genus Ranunculus, a group of flowering plants that includes over 600 species worldwide. Ranunculus pilosifrons is further classified within the Ranunculales order, which is a large and diverse order of flowering plants. At the kingdom level, it is classified as Plantae, indicating its status as a plant species. The full classification of Ranunculus pilosifrons is: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Ranunculales, Order: Ranunculales, Family: Ranunculaceae, Genus: Ranunculus, Species: R. pilosifrons.

The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
